pattern: A direct string transformation that replaces every literal dot with a bracketed form, teaching basic per-character rewriting.
hints: Only one kind of character needs to change; every other character is copied as-is.
Think about what a dot should become and replace each occurrence with that exact text.
Walk the string and emit '[.]' whenever you see a '.', otherwise emit the character unchanged; a single replace call also works.

edge_inputs.description: standard address from the first example
longest possible address with max-width octets
octets that share digits across positions

stress.description: random valid IPv4 addresses to exercise the dot replacement repeatedly
